title: drosera macrantha subsp. planchonii
intro: Drosera macrantha subsp. planchonii, also known as Planchon's sundew, is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the Droseraceae family. Traditionally, sundews have been used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Drosera macrantha subsp. planchonii include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma, as well as its potential to alleviate digestive problems and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Drosera macrantha subsp. planchonii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
